properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You've been waiting and praying for so many years; Overcome with the doubts that just led you to fear, But you stayed strong (but you stayed strong), And you held on.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To the God who makes way when your path is unclear; Giving hope, shining light, making lust disappear, Bring a new life (bring a new life), Before your eyes

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's been a long time coming, Trusting in the Father, Victory is sweet when you felt defeat, But you didn't give up or retreat; It is His faith that kept me going, While waiting on the promise. All my hopes and dreams Impossible it seems fulfill But now it's all I see, It's been a long time coming.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now you see that He's done All He said, He will do; You can trust in His Word Cause He'll always come through, Always faithful (always faithful), More than able.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When you trust and believe (trust and believe…) All the miracles you'll see.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's been a long time coming… (long time coming) (long time coming) It's been a long time coming.
